headline: First Solar Inc (FSLR) Stock Gets Added Attention on Potential China Ban
summary: First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR) is one of Peconic Partners’ stock picks. The hedge fund boosted its stake in First Solar stock by 34% during Q1 2026. The stock has gained more than 42% over the past year, and it boasts the backing of 67 hedge funds. On June 30, First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR) shares popped […]
